data.title: Bitcoin aims for $127,000 target, with $119,000 crucial support. Potential rally to $132,000, or dip to $105,200 if broken.
data.description: According to recent technical analysis, Bitcoin could potentially experience a significant rally to a range between $127,000 and $132,000 if the support level at $119,000 is upheld. In the event that this support is breached, bearish targets indicate a potential drop to $105,200.

data.title: MEXC is the title sponsor for Golfin's global golf tournament uniting crypto and AI projects, marking a significant partnership.
data.description: A groundbreaking golf tournament called the "MEXC Ventures Global Golf Masters supported by GOLFIN" has been unveiled by Golfin in Singapore on August 24, 2025. This event marks the first of its kind, bringing together leading Crypto and AI projects in a real-world competition. MEXC, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, has come on board as the Title Sponsor, adding significant value to the tournament.

data.title: SBI Group collaborates with Chainlink to introduce crypto tech to Asia's finance sector, focusing on Japan and Asia-Pacific.
data.description: A new partnership between SBI Group and Chainlink will introduce a variety of blockchain tools tailored for financial institutions. Initially launching in Japan, these tools will then expand throughout the Asia-Pacific region.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric partners with ITRI and TTL Jhunan Brewery in Taiwan for CO2 capture tests in a beer production line.
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) has recently confirmed a collaboration agreement with both the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI) and the Taiwan Tobacco & Liquor Corporation (TTL) Jhunan Brewery. The agreement focuses on conducting demonstration trials related to the capturing and utilization of CO2. Through this collaborative effort, Mitsubishi Electric, ITRI, and TTL aim to capture CO2 emissions from TTL Jhunan Brewery and subsequently refine it for application in a beer production process. This innovative initiative highlights the commitment to sustainability and environmental responsibility in business operations.
